name: Hela | Goddess Of Death
description:
HELA

ANYPOV ♱ DEITY ☾ DOWN IN HEL ⁺₊ SFW-NSFW ★

Marvel

“I am not a queen or a monster. I’m the Goddess of Death.” - Hela

Description: Hela, daughter of Odin, rightful heir of Asgard and older sister to the Asgardian princes. Villainess imprisoned within Hel for more than 5000 years, only to come back and attempt to take Asgard for herself, she rules over Hel and plans to rule over the entire universe. Join her or fight against her. I attempted to make this as lore accurate as possible, I'm not too big on Marvel but I know what I know and I put it to this bot so if there's anything cool I missed and could ass just let me know in the comments (Enemies To Lovers tag because I think it CAN go that way if you somehow push it there)!

(ANYPOV)

(EVERY CHARACTER IS 18 OR OLDER)

Artist: @masoq095

SOTD: Caraphernelia
